name: Self Trust
description: Whether the person trusts their own signal enough to act before total certainty.

name: Action Momentum
description: How much recent action has converted insight into external reality.

name: Relational Safety
description: Whether relationships can hold truth, discomfort, and change without collapse.

name: Financial Buffer
description: How much money and income stability can support experimentation.

name: Body Recovery
description: Whether the body and attention system can sustainably fund the current path.

name: Social Visibility
description: Whether the person's ability is visible beyond the existing circle.

name: Family Gravity
description: How strongly family expectation pulls choices back toward the old stable identity.

name: Identity Flexibility
description: How easily the person can leave an old identity before the new one is socially confirmed.
